directive: In src/**/*.ts, do not add runtime imports from third-party packages that are re-exported by src/third_party/index.ts; import runtime values from the local src/third_party/index.js barrel instead. Type-only imports and files under src/third_party/ are allowed.
rationale: The repository bundles selected third-party dependencies through src/third_party/index.ts so runtime imports survive the published package build. Direct runtime imports from those dependencies in src files can work during development but fail after bundling.

source_evidence.excerpt: The Source files block applies @local/no-direct-third-party-imports as an error for files matching src/**/*.ts.
The rule reports runtime imports of bundled third-party packages outside src/third_party/ and says to use src/third_party/index.js instead; type-only imports are allowed.
The barrel re-exports runtime values such as semver, debug, zod, puppeteer, and MCP SDK helpers.
